title: Unexpected Inner Join Crash
description: I perform some join and meet unexpected crash, and I will appreciate your effort if you can review it.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(10), c3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'test', TRUE), (2, 'example', FALSE);
SELECT * FROM t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT c1, (c1 IN (1, 2)) AS match FROM t1) AS sub ON t1.c1 = sub.c1;
SELECT * FROM t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT (c2 IS NOT NULL) AS not_null FROM t1) AS sub ON sub.not_null = TRUE;
SELECT * FROM t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT (c3 = TRUE) AS is_true FROM t1 WHERE c1 > 0) AS sub ON t1.c3 = sub.is_true;
key_bug_features: INNER JOIN with subquery causes unexpected crash
